title: Backend Developer Vacancy at KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies in Gwalior offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies:
KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies!
